channel.title: r4sso.my
channel.description: My personal website, blog and notes of r4sso

item.title: Install Cisco Packet Tracer on Arch Linux
item.description: A guide to install Cisco Packet Tracer on Arch Linux

item.title: Install Cisco Packet Tracer on Alpine Linux
item.description: A guide to install Cisco Packet Tracer on Alpine Linux using distrobox.

item.title: TryHackMe - RootMe
item.description: Classic web-to-root escalation, touching on enumeration, upload bypass, reverse shells, and privilege escalation using SUID binaries.

item.title: Site dev: What I Learned
item.description: All things about what I learned when making this site.

item.title: My Janky Home Server
item.description: My first home server, janky but serve me well, and list of software I use.

item.title: Deploy pihole + unbound on alpine
item.description: Basic walkthrough deploying pihole with unbound on alpine linux using docker.

item.title: Fix EasySMX SL-9111 Detected as Nintendo Controller on Linux
item.description: A quick guide to fix a generic multi-mode controller being incorrectly detected as the wrong controller in Linux by blacklisting a module.
